name: 以史为鉴
description: 以史为鉴 yi-shi-wei-jian: use/call this Chinese-history decision sandbox when users explicitly mention 以史为鉴、借古鉴今、历史类比、沙盘推演, or ask realistic organization/business/team strategy questions about reform, internal conflict, weak-vs-strong competition, unstable alliances, control rights, leadership replacement, attack/defense timing, or adding sourced historical cases.
author: GreatXiaoRY
